contents:
Require Import
  HoTT.Classes.interfaces.abstract_algebra
  HoTT.Classes.theory.additional_operations
  HoTT.Classes.tactics.ring_quote
  HoTT.Classes.theory.rings.

Inductive Pol : Type@{UC} :=
  | Pconst (c : C)
  | PX (P : Pol) (v : V) (Q : Pol).

(* [C] is the scalar semiring: Z when working on rings,
   N on semirings, other sometimes. *)

(* [V] is the type of variables, ie we are defining polynomials [C[V]].
   It has a computable compare so we can normalise polynomials. *)

(* Polynomials are supposed (at the meta level) to be in normal form:
   PX P v Q verifies
     + P <> 0
     + forall w in P, w <= v
     + forall w in Q, w <  v *)

Fixpoint Peqb P Q : Bool :=
  match P, Q with
  | Pconst c, Pconst d => c =? d
  | PX P1 v P2, PX Q1 w Q2 =>
    andb (v =? w) (andb (Peqb P1 Q1) (Peqb P2 Q2))
  | _, _ => false
  end.

Context {R : Type@{UR} } `{AlmostRing R}
  (phi : C -> R) `{!AlmostRingPreserving phi}.

Fixpoint eval (vs : Vars V) (P : Pol) : R :=
  match P with
  | Pconst c => phi c
  | PX P v Q =>
    (eval vs P) * (vs v) + (eval vs Q)
  end.
Lemma andb_true : forall a b : Bool, andb a b = true -> a = true /\ b = true.

goals.conclusion: forall a b : Bool, (a && b)%Bool = true -> (a = true) * (b = true)
forall a b : Bool, (a && b)%Bool = true -> (a = true) * (b = true)

contents:
Lemma eval_eqb' : forall P Q : Pol, P =? Q = true ->
  forall vs : Vars V, eval vs P = eval vs Q.

goals.conclusion:
forall P Q : Pol,
(P =? Q) = true -> forall vs : Vars V, eval vs P = eval vs Q

forall P Q : Pol,
(P =? Q) = true -> forall vs : Vars V, eval vs P = eval vs Q

contents:
induction P as [c|P1 IHP1 v P2 IHP2];destruct Q as [d|Q1 w Q2];intros E vs;
change eqb with Peqb in E;simpl in E.

goals.conclusion: eval vs (Pconst c) = eval vs (Pconst d)
eval vs (Pconst c) = eval vs (PX Q1 w Q2)
eval vs (PX P1 v P2) = eval vs (Pconst d)

hypotheses.type:
forall Q : Pol,
(P1 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P1 = eval vs0 Q

forall Q : Pol,
(P2 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P2 = eval vs0 Q

goals.conclusion: eval vs (PX P1 v P2) = eval vs (PX Q1 w Q2)

hypotheses.type:
forall Q : Pol,
(P1 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P1 = eval vs0 Q

forall Q : Pol,
(P2 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P2 = eval vs0 Q
((v =? w) && (Peqb P1 Q1 && Peqb P2 Q2))%Bool = true

goals.conclusion: eval vs (Pconst c) = eval vs (Pconst d)
phi c = phi d
c = d
eval vs (Pconst c) = eval vs (PX Q1 w Q2)
eval vs (PX P1 v P2) = eval vs (Pconst d)

hypotheses.type:
forall Q : Pol,
(P1 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P1 = eval vs0 Q

forall Q : Pol,
(P2 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P2 = eval vs0 Q

goals.conclusion: eval vs (PX P1 v P2) = eval vs (PX Q1 w Q2)

hypotheses.type:
forall Q : Pol,
(P1 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P1 = eval vs0 Q

forall Q : Pol,
(P2 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P2 = eval vs0 Q
((v =? w) && (Peqb P1 Q1 && Peqb P2 Q2))%Bool = true

goals.conclusion: eval vs (PX P1 v P2) = eval vs (PX Q1 w Q2)

hypotheses.type:
forall Q : Pol,
(P1 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P1 = eval vs0 Q

forall Q : Pol,
(P2 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P2 = eval vs0 Q
((v =? w) = true) * ((Peqb P1 Q1 && Peqb P2 Q2)%Bool = true)

goals.conclusion: eval vs (PX P1 v P2) = eval vs (PX Q1 w Q2)

hypotheses.type:
forall Q : Pol,
(P1 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P1 = eval vs0 Q

forall Q : Pol,
(P2 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P2 = eval vs0 Q
(Peqb P1 Q1 && Peqb P2 Q2)%Bool = true

goals.conclusion: eval vs (PX P1 v P2) = eval vs (PX Q1 w Q2)

hypotheses.type:
forall Q : Pol,
(P1 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P1 = eval vs0 Q

forall Q : Pol,
(P2 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P2 = eval vs0 Q
(Peqb P1 Q1 = true) * (Peqb P2 Q2 = true)

goals.conclusion: eval vs (PX P1 v P2) = eval vs (PX Q1 w Q2)

hypotheses.type:
forall Q : Pol,
(P1 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P1 = eval vs0 Q

forall Q : Pol,
(P2 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P2 = eval vs0 Q

goals.conclusion: eval vs P1 * vs v + eval vs P2 = eval vs Q1 * vs w + eval vs Q2

hypotheses.type:
forall Q : Pol,
(P1 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P1 = eval vs0 Q

forall Q : Pol,
(P2 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P2 = eval vs0 Q

goals.conclusion: eval vs P1 * vs v + eval vs P2 = eval vs Q1 * vs w + eval vs Q2

hypotheses.type:
forall Q : Pol,
(P1 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P1 = eval vs0 Q

forall Q : Pol,
(P2 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P2 = eval vs0 Q

goals.conclusion: eval vs P1 * vs v = eval vs Q1 * vs w

hypotheses.type:
forall Q : Pol,
(P1 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P1 = eval vs0 Q

forall Q : Pol,
(P2 =? Q) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P2 = eval vs0 Q

contents:
Definition eval_eqb@{} := ltac:(first [exact eval_eqb'@{Ularge}|
                                       exact eval_eqb']).
Lemma eval_0' : forall P, P =? 0 = true -> forall vs, eval vs P = 0.

goals.conclusion: forall P : Pol, (P =? 0) = true -> forall vs : Vars V, eval vs P = 0
forall P : Pol, (P =? 0) = true -> forall vs : Vars V, eval vs P = 0
phi c = 0
eval vs P2 * vs v + eval vs P3 = 0

hypotheses.type: (P2 =? 0) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P2 = 0
(P3 =? 0) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P3 = 0

goals.conclusion: phi c = 0

contents: change eqb with Peqb in E;simpl in E.

goals.conclusion: phi c = 0
phi c = 0
phi 0 = 0
eval vs P2 * vs v + eval vs P3 = 0

hypotheses.type: (P2 =? 0) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P2 = 0
(P3 =? 0) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P3 = 0

contents: change eqb with Peqb in E;simpl in E.

goals.conclusion: eval vs P2 * vs v + eval vs P3 = 0

hypotheses.type: (P2 =? 0) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P2 = 0
(P3 =? 0) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P3 = 0

contents:
Definition eval_0@{} := ltac:(first [exact eval_0'@{Ularge}|
                                     exact eval_0']).

Fixpoint addC c P :=
  match P with
  | Pconst d => Pconst (c + d)
  | PX P v Q =>
    PX P v (addC c Q)
  end.
Lemma eval_addC vs : forall c P, eval vs (addC c P) = (phi c) + eval vs P.

goals.conclusion: forall (c : C) (P : Pol), eval vs (addC c P) = phi c + eval vs P
forall (c : C) (P : Pol), eval vs (addC c P) = phi c + eval vs P
phi (c + c0) = phi c + phi c0

eval vs P2 * vs v + eval vs (addC c P3) =
phi c + (eval vs P2 * vs v + eval vs P3)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addC c P2) = phi c + eval vs P2
eval vs (addC c P3) = phi c + eval vs P3

goals.conclusion: phi (c + c0) = phi c + phi c0

eval vs P2 * vs v + eval vs (addC c P3) =
phi c + (eval vs P2 * vs v + eval vs P3)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addC c P2) = phi c + eval vs P2
eval vs (addC c P3) = phi c + eval vs P3

goals.conclusion:
eval vs P2 * vs v + (phi c + eval vs P3) =
phi c + (eval vs P2 * vs v + eval vs P3)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addC c P2) = phi c + eval vs P2
eval vs (addC c P3) = phi c + eval vs P3

goals.conclusion:
eval vs P2 * vs v + phi c + eval vs P3 =
phi c + eval vs P2 * vs v + eval vs P3

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addC c P2) = phi c + eval vs P2
eval vs (addC c P3) = phi c + eval vs P3

goals.conclusion:
eval vs P2 * vs v + phi c + eval vs P3 =
eval vs P2 * vs v + phi c + eval vs P3

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addC c P2) = phi c + eval vs P2
eval vs (addC c P3) = phi c + eval vs P3

contents:
Fixpoint addX' c v Q :=
  match Q with
  | Pconst d => PX (Pconst c) v Q
  | PX Q1 w Q2 =>
    match v ?= w with
    | LT =>
      PX Q1 w (addX' c v Q2)
    | EQ =>
      PX (addC c Q1) v Q2
    | GT => PX (Pconst c) v Q
    end
  end.
Definition addX c v Q := if c =? 0 then Q else addX' c v Q.

Lemma eval_addX'@{} vs : forall c (v:V) Q,
  eval vs (addX' c v Q) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q.

goals.conclusion:
forall (c : C) (v : V) (Q : Pol),
eval vs (addX' c v Q) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q

forall (c : C) (v : V) (Q : Pol),
eval vs (addX' c v Q) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q

contents: induction Q as [d|Q1 IH1 w Q2 IH2].

goals.conclusion: eval vs (addX' c v (Pconst d)) = phi c * vs v + eval vs (Pconst d)
eval vs (addX' c v (PX Q1 w Q2)) = phi c * vs v + eval vs (PX Q1 w Q2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

goals.conclusion: eval vs (addX' c v (Pconst d)) = phi c * vs v + eval vs (Pconst d)
phi c * vs v + phi d = phi c * vs v + phi d
eval vs (addX' c v (PX Q1 w Q2)) = phi c * vs v + eval vs (PX Q1 w Q2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

goals.conclusion:
eval vs
  match v ?= w with
  | LT => PX Q1 w (addX' c v Q2)
  | EQ => PX (addC c Q1) v Q2
  | GT => PX (Pconst c) v (PX Q1 w Q2)
  end =
phi c * vs v + (eval vs Q1 * vs w + eval vs Q2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

contents: pose proof (tricho_compare_eq v w) as E.

goals.conclusion:
eval vs
  match v ?= w with
  | LT => PX Q1 w (addX' c v Q2)
  | EQ => PX (addC c Q1) v Q2
  | GT => PX (Pconst c) v (PX Q1 w Q2)
  end =
phi c * vs v + (eval vs Q1 * vs w + eval vs Q2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

contents: destruct (v ?= w);[clear E|rewrite <-E by split;clear E w|clear E].

goals.conclusion:
eval vs (PX Q1 w (addX' c v Q2)) =
phi c * vs v + (eval vs Q1 * vs w + eval vs Q2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

goals.conclusion:
eval vs (PX (addC c Q1) v Q2) =
phi c * vs v + (eval vs Q1 * vs v + eval vs Q2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

goals.conclusion:
eval vs (PX (Pconst c) v (PX Q1 w Q2)) =
phi c * vs v + (eval vs Q1 * vs w + eval vs Q2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

goals.conclusion:
eval vs (PX Q1 w (addX' c v Q2)) =
phi c * vs v + (eval vs Q1 * vs w + eval vs Q2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

goals.conclusion:
eval vs Q1 * vs w + eval vs (addX' c v Q2) =
phi c * vs v + (eval vs Q1 * vs w + eval vs Q2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

goals.conclusion:
eval vs Q1 * vs w + (phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2) =
phi c * vs v + (eval vs Q1 * vs w + eval vs Q2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

goals.conclusion:
eval vs Q1 * vs w + phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2 =
phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1 * vs w + eval vs Q2

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

goals.conclusion: eval vs Q1 * vs w + phi c * vs v = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1 * vs w

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

goals.conclusion:
eval vs (PX (addC c Q1) v Q2) =
phi c * vs v + (eval vs Q1 * vs v + eval vs Q2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

goals.conclusion:
eval vs (addC c Q1) * vs v + eval vs Q2 =
phi c * vs v + (eval vs Q1 * vs v + eval vs Q2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

goals.conclusion:
(phi c + eval vs Q1) * vs v + eval vs Q2 =
phi c * vs v + (eval vs Q1 * vs v + eval vs Q2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

goals.conclusion:
phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1 * vs v + eval vs Q2 =
phi c * vs v + (eval vs Q1 * vs v + eval vs Q2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

goals.conclusion:
eval vs (PX (Pconst c) v (PX Q1 w Q2)) =
phi c * vs v + (eval vs Q1 * vs w + eval vs Q2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

goals.conclusion:
phi c * vs v + (eval vs Q1 * vs w + eval vs Q2) =
phi c * vs v + (eval vs Q1 * vs w + eval vs Q2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (addX' c v Q1) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (addX' c v Q2) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q2

contents:
Lemma eval_addX vs : forall c (v:V) Q,
  eval vs (addX c v Q) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q.

goals.conclusion:
forall (c : C) (v : V) (Q : Pol),
eval vs (addX c v Q) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q

forall (c : C) (v : V) (Q : Pol),
eval vs (addX c v Q) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q
eval vs (addX c v Q) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q
eval vs (if c =? 0 then Q else addX' c v Q) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q
eval vs (if c =? 0 then Q else addX' c v Q) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q
eval vs Q = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q
eval vs (addX' c v Q) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q
eval vs Q = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q
eval vs Q = phi 0 * vs v + eval vs Q
eval vs Q = 0 * vs v + eval vs Q
eval vs Q = eval vs Q
eval vs (addX' c v Q) = phi c * vs v + eval vs Q

contents: Definition PXguard@{} P v Q := if eqb P 0 then Q else PX P v Q.

Lemma eval_PXguard vs : forall P (v:V) Q,
  eval vs (PXguard P v Q) = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs Q.

goals.conclusion:
forall (P : Pol) (v : V) (Q : Pol),
eval vs (PXguard P v Q) = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs Q

forall (P : Pol) (v : V) (Q : Pol),
eval vs (PXguard P v Q) = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs Q
eval vs (PXguard P v Q) = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs Q
eval vs (if P =? 0 then Q else PX P v Q) = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs Q
eval vs (if P =? 0 then Q else PX P v Q) = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs Q

hypotheses.type: (P =? 0) = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P = 0

goals.conclusion: eval vs Q = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs Q

hypotheses.type: true = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P = 0

goals.conclusion: eval vs (PX P v Q) = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs Q

hypotheses.type: false = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P = 0

goals.conclusion: eval vs Q = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs Q

hypotheses.type: true = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P = 0

goals.conclusion: eval vs Q = 0 * vs v + eval vs Q

hypotheses.type: true = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P = 0

goals.conclusion: eval vs Q = eval vs Q

hypotheses.type: true = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P = 0

goals.conclusion: eval vs (PX P v Q) = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs Q

hypotheses.type: false = true -> forall vs0 : Vars V, eval vs0 P = 0

contents:
Fixpoint mulC c P :=
  match P with
  | Pconst d => Pconst (c * d)
  | PX P v Q =>
    (* in some semirings we can have zero divisors, so P' might be zero *)
    PXguard (mulC c P) v (mulC c Q)
  end.
Lemma eval_mulC vs : forall c P, eval vs (mulC c P) = (phi c) * eval vs P.

goals.conclusion: forall (c : C) (P : Pol), eval vs (mulC c P) = phi c * eval vs P
forall (c : C) (P : Pol), eval vs (mulC c P) = phi c * eval vs P

contents: induction P as [d | P1 IH1 v P2 IH2];simpl.

goals.conclusion: phi (c * d) = phi c * phi d

eval vs (PXguard (mulC c P1) v (mulC c P2)) =
phi c * (eval vs P1 * vs v + eval vs P2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (mulC c P1) = phi c * eval vs P1
eval vs (mulC c P2) = phi c * eval vs P2

goals.conclusion: phi (c * d) = phi c * phi d

eval vs (PXguard (mulC c P1) v (mulC c P2)) =
phi c * (eval vs P1 * vs v + eval vs P2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (mulC c P1) = phi c * eval vs P1
eval vs (mulC c P2) = phi c * eval vs P2

goals.conclusion:
eval vs (mulC c P1) * vs v + eval vs (mulC c P2) =
phi c * (eval vs P1 * vs v + eval vs P2)

hypotheses.type: eval vs (mulC c P1) = phi c * eval vs P1
eval vs (mulC c P2) = phi c * eval vs P2

goals.conclusion:
phi c * eval vs P1 * vs v + phi c * eval vs P2 =
phi c * eval vs P1 * vs v + phi c * eval vs P2

hypotheses.type: eval vs (mulC c P1) = phi c * eval vs P1
eval vs (mulC c P2) = phi c * eval vs P2

contents: (* if P <= v, P <> 0, and addP Q = P + Q then P * v + Q *)

Fixpoint add_aux addP P v Q :=
  match Q with
  | Pconst _ => PX P v Q
  | PX Q1 w Q2 =>
    match v ?= w with
    | LT =>
      PX Q1 w (add_aux addP P v Q2)
    | EQ => PXguard (addP Q1) v Q2
    | GT =>
      PX P v Q
    end
  end.

Fixpoint add P Q :=
  match P with
  | Pconst c => addC c Q
  | PX P1 v P2 => add_aux (add P1) P1 v (add P2 Q)
  end.

Lemma eval_add_aux vs P addP
  (Eadd : forall Q, eval vs (addP Q) = eval vs P + eval vs Q)
  : forall (v:V) Q, eval vs (add_aux addP P v Q) = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs Q.

goals.conclusion:
forall (v : V) (Q : Pol),
eval vs (add_aux addP P v Q) = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs Q

hypotheses.type: forall Q : Pol, eval vs (addP Q) = eval vs P + eval vs Q

goals.conclusion:
forall (v : V) (Q : Pol),
eval vs (add_aux addP P v Q) = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs Q

hypotheses.type: forall Q : Pol, eval vs (addP Q) = eval vs P + eval vs Q

contents: induction Q as [d|Q1 IH1 w Q2 IH2].

goals.conclusion: eval vs (add_aux addP P v (Pconst d)) = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs (Pconst d)

hypotheses.type: forall Q : Pol, eval vs (addP Q) = eval vs P + eval vs Q

goals.conclusion:
eval vs (add_aux addP P v (PX Q1 w Q2)) =
eval vs P * vs v + eval vs (PX Q1 w Q2)

hypotheses.type: forall Q : Pol, eval vs (addP Q) = eval vs P + eval vs Q
eval vs (add_aux addP P v Q1) = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs Q1
eval vs (add_aux addP P v Q2) = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs Q2

goals.conclusion: eval vs (add_aux addP P v (Pconst d)) = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs (Pconst d)

hypotheses.type: forall Q : Pol, eval vs (addP Q) = eval vs P + eval vs Q

goals.conclusion: eval vs P * vs v + phi d = eval vs P * vs v + phi d

hypotheses.type: forall Q : Pol, eval vs (addP Q) = eval vs P + eval vs Q

goals.conclusion:
eval vs (add_aux addP P v (PX Q1 w Q2)) =
eval vs P * vs v + eval vs (PX Q1 w Q2)

contents:
Definition eval_add@{} := ltac:(first [exact eval_add'@{Ularge}|
                                       exact eval_add'@{}]).

Fixpoint mulX v P :=
  match P with
  | Pconst c => addX c v 0
  | PX P1 w P2 =>
    match v ?= w with
    | LT =>
      PX (mulX v P1) w (mulX v P2)
    | _ => PX P v 0
    end
  end.
Lemma eval_mulX@{} vs : forall (v:V) (P:Pol), eval vs (mulX v P) = eval vs P * vs v.

goals.conclusion: forall (v : V) (P : Pol), eval vs (mulX v P) = eval vs P * vs v
forall (v : V) (P : Pol), eval vs (mulX v P) = eval vs P * vs v

contents: induction P as [c|P1 IH1 w P2 IH2].

goals.conclusion: eval vs (mulX v (Pconst c)) = eval vs (Pconst c) * vs v
eval vs (mulX v (PX P1 w P2)) = eval vs (PX P1 w P2) * vs v

hypotheses.type: eval vs (mulX v P1) = eval vs P1 * vs v
eval vs (mulX v P2) = eval vs P2 * vs v

goals.conclusion: eval vs (mulX v (Pconst c)) = eval vs (Pconst c) * vs v
eval vs (addX c v 0) = phi c * vs v
phi c * vs v + eval vs 0 = phi c * vs v
phi c * vs v + phi 0 = phi c * vs v
phi c * vs v = phi c * vs v
eval vs (mulX v (PX P1 w P2)) = eval vs (PX P1 w P2) * vs v

eval vs (mulX v P2) = eval vs P2 * vs v

  match v ?= w with
  | LT => PX (mulX v P1) w (mulX v P2)
  | _ => PX (PX P1 w P2) v 0
  end =
(eval vs P1 * vs w + eval vs P2) * vs v

eval vs (mulX v P2) = eval vs P2 * vs v

contents: Definition mkPX P v Q := add (mulX v P) Q.

Lemma eval_mkPX vs : forall P v Q,
  eval vs (mkPX P v Q) = (eval vs P) * (vs v) + eval vs Q.

eval vs P * vs v + eval vs Q = eval vs P * vs v + eval vs Q

contents:
Fixpoint mul P Q :=
  match P, Q with
  | Pconst c, _ => mulC c Q
  | _, Pconst d => mulC d P
  | PX P1 v P2, PX Q1 w Q2 =>
    (* P1 Q1 v w + P1 Q2 v + P2 Q1 w + P2 Q2 *)
    add (mulX v (add (mulX w (mul P1 Q1)) (mul P1 Q2)))
        (add (mulX w (mul P2 Q1)) (mul P2 Q2))
  end.
Lemma eval_mul' vs : forall P Q, eval vs (mul P Q) = eval vs P * eval vs Q.

goals.conclusion: forall P Q : Pol, eval vs (mul P Q) = eval vs P * eval vs Q
forall P Q : Pol, eval vs (mul P Q) = eval vs P * eval vs Q

forall Q : Pol,
eval vs (mul (PX P1 v P2) Q) = eval vs (PX P1 v P2) * eval vs Q

forall Q : Pol, eval vs (mul P2 Q) = eval vs P2 * eval vs Q

hypotheses.type: forall Q : Pol, eval vs (mul P1 Q) = eval vs P1 * eval vs Q
forall Q : Pol, eval vs (mul P2 Q) = eval vs P2 * eval vs Q

goals.conclusion: eval vs P2 * eval vs Q1 * vs w = eval vs P2 * (eval vs Q1 * vs w)

hypotheses.type: forall Q : Pol, eval vs (mul P1 Q) = eval vs P1 * eval vs Q
forall Q : Pol, eval vs (mul P2 Q) = eval vs P2 * eval vs Q

goals.conclusion: eval vs (mul P2 Q2) = eval vs P2 * eval vs Q2

hypotheses.type: forall Q : Pol, eval vs (mul P1 Q) = eval vs P1 * eval vs Q
forall Q : Pol, eval vs (mul P2 Q) = eval vs P2 * eval vs Q

contents:
Fixpoint toPol (e: Expr V) :=
  match e with
  | Var v => PX 1 v 0
  | Zero => 0
  | One => 1
  | Plus a b => add (toPol a) (toPol b)
  | Mult a b => mul (toPol a) (toPol b)
  | Neg a => mulC (almost_negate 1) (toPol a)
  end.

Lemma eval_toPol@{} vs : forall e : Expr V,
  eval vs (toPol e) = Quoting.eval _ vs e.

goals.conclusion: forall e : Expr V, eval vs (toPol e) = Quoting.eval R vs e
forall e : Expr V, eval vs (toPol e) = Quoting.eval R vs e

eval vs (toPol b) = Quoting.eval R vs b
